ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey period */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code representing the region where the survey was conducted */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., Alcohol Consumption, Mental Wellbeing) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., Active, Completed, Draft) */,
  "survey_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the survey (e.g., Annual, Biennial) */,
  "contact_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact person responsible for the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_contact_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_person_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_region_code FOREIGN KEY ("region_code") REFERENCES regions ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the health indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health indicator */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of indicator (e.g., Percent, Score) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator (e.g., Lifestyle, Mental Health) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., Self-reported, Clinical) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the indicator details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the data belongs to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the health indicator being measured */,
  "date_code" TEXT /* Date code representing the survey period */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., Percent, Confidence Limit) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the population (e.g., All, Male, Female) */,
  "confidence_interval_type" TEXT /* Type of confidence interval (e.g., 95% Upper, 95% Lower) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population (e.g., 18-25, 26-35) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., Online, In-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_data_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_data_confidence_interval_type FOREIGN KEY ("confidence_interval_type") REFERENCES confidence_intervals ("interval_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code representing the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the region (e.g., Urban, Rural) */,
  "last_survey_conducted" TEXT /* Date of the last survey conducted in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES survey_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confidence_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence interval type */,
  "interval_type" TEXT /* Type of confidence interval (e.g., 95% Upper, 95% Lower) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the confidence interval type */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level (e.g., 0.95 for 95%) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the confidence interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)
